node.name: Fort York National Historic Site
node.description: Explore Toronto's birthplace featuring restored 1812 military buildings and costumed interpreters.

node.name: Distillery District
node.description: Beautifully preserved Victorian industrial architecture, once the largest distillery in the British Empire.

node.name: Gibraltar Point Lighthouse
node.description: Toronto's oldest surviving lighthouse built in 1808, supposedly haunted.
